raw.message: Your favorite reels just got an upgrade 🎰 DraftKings Casino’s new, exclusive FLEX SPINS give you the power to play your way 👑

hook.summary: Announcement of the new 'Flex Spins' feature with dynamic text and floating game icons.
hook.visual_action: Bold yellow text announcing 'Flex Spins' is displayed while slot game icons float around a central logo on a vibrant purple background.

scene_flow: Main title card appears with 'Flex Spins' branding and floating game icons.
Secondary text explains the feature as an exclusive way to choose how to use spins.
Legal disclaimer text remains static at the bottom throughout the short loop.
on_screen_text: An EXCLUSIVE way to choose how to use your spins
GAMBLING PROBLEM? CALL 1-800-GAMBLER (MI/NJ/PA/WV). HELP IS AVAILABLE FOR PROBLEM GAMBLING. CALL (888) 789-7777 OR VISIT CCPG.ORG (CT).
audience_proxy: Adult casino enthusiasts interested in new mechanics and promotional offers.
